## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --check` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] `cargo test` passes
- [ ] `cargo audit` passes

- [ ] Updated README if user-facing behavior changed

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
